channel.title: Architecture on Rafael Vaz | AI Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Architecture on Rafael Vaz | AI Portfolio

item.title: Dev, Architecture, and AI
item.description:
Hello! I am Rafael Vaz de Lima, a Senior Software Engineer based in Brazil. With over a decade of experience in development and infrastructure, I have decided to consolidate my passion for high-performance systems and Artificial Intelligence.

🚀 Experience and Seniority

My career has been built by tackling complex architectural challenges. I have a solid track record with technologies that demand resilience and scalability.

🛠️ Core Tech Stack

  • Backend:
    • 🐹 Go (My current choice for performance)
    • 🟢 Node.js
    • 🔷 C#
    • 🐘 PHP
  • Mobile & Frontend:
    • 📱 Kotlin & Jetpack Compose (Android Development)
    • 🟨 JavaScript
  • AI & Data:
    • 🤖 RAG, LLMs, and Generative AI (Focus of my current postgraduate studies)
    • 🐍 Python & Scrapy (Advanced Web Scraping)
